description_long: This is a pair of automatic wire strippers with ergonomic, dual-material handles in orange and gray. The handles are thick and contoured for comfort, featuring visible text and branding on one side. The upper section consists of a robust metal mechanism with exposed gears, springs, and a cutting jaw, designed for stripping insulation from electrical wires. The jaws are notched and shaped to accommodate various wire gauges, with a visible adjustment knob and a spring-loaded action for automatic operation. The tool's construction combines metal for strength and plastic/rubber for grip and insulation. The overall design is modern and functional, suitable for electrical work in urban environments such as garages, workshops, or construction sites.
description: Automatic wire strippers with orange and gray ergonomic handles, exposed metal mechanism, and notched jaws for stripping insulation from wires.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open jaws, exposed metal stripping mechanism, and visible branding on the handles.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the handles and the profile of the metal mechanism at the top.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid orange and gray handle backs and the closed jaw profile.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the handle's grip texture and the side of the metal mechanism.
attribute_handle_type: Ergonomic, straight handles with contoured grip, dual-material (rubberized and plastic) for comfort and insulation.
attribute_jaw_design: Notched, flat jaws with integrated wire stripping slots and a cutting edge, designed for automatic wire stripping and cutting.
attribute_pivot_mechanism: Compound pivot mechanism with visible spring and adjustment knob, enabling automatic jaw movement and adjustable stripping action.
attribute_grip_pattern: Rubberized, ribbed texture on the gray sections of the handles for enhanced grip and slip resistance.
